subject.descriptionZh: 组合、递推、计数、离散结构与基础证明方法；图论相关内容归入“图论与组合优化”。
subject.descriptionJa: 組合せ、漸化式、数え上げ、離散構造、基礎的な証明方法。グラフ理論関連は「グラフ理論・組合せ最適化」に分類する。
subject.descriptionEn: Combinatorics, recurrences, counting, discrete structures, and basic proof methods. Graph-related content lives under Graph Theory & Combinatorial Optimization.

Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.subject: Discrete-Mathematics
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionZh: 组合计数、二项式系数、卡特兰数与递推关系。
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionJa: 組合せ数え上げ、二項係数、カタラン数、漸化式。
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionEn: Combinatorial counting, binomial coefficients, Catalan numbers, and recurrence relations.

Discrete-Mathematics.Set-Theory.subject: Discrete-Mathematics
Discrete-Mathematics.Set-Theory.descriptionZh: 集合、映射、像与逆像、基数及有限集合的基本结构。
Discrete-Mathematics.Set-Theory.descriptionJa: 集合、写像、像と逆像、濃度、有限集合の基本構造。
Discrete-Mathematics.Set-Theory.descriptionEn: Sets, maps, images and preimages, cardinality, and basic finite-set structures.

Discrete-Mathematics.Mathematical-Logic.subject: Discrete-Mathematics
Discrete-Mathematics.Mathematical-Logic.descriptionZh: 命题与谓词逻辑、量词以及离散数学中的基本证明方法。
Discrete-Mathematics.Mathematical-Logic.descriptionJa: 命題論理、述語論理、量化記号、離散数学の基本的な証明法。
Discrete-Mathematics.Mathematical-Logic.descriptionEn: Propositional and predicate logic, quantifiers, and basic proof methods in discrete mathematics.
